title: [Crafting] More Recycling
description: Makes many more items smeltable for iron, gold, and copper!
body:
This data pack overhauls the recycling system by greatly increasing the number of items that can be smelted for iron, gold, or copper. The amount that you get is also dependent on how much is used in the recipe. Items that have 4 or more iron will smelt back to a whole ingot! Now you can recycle anything containing a substantial amount of iron, gold, or copper, such as hoppers, cauldrons, iron bars, horse armor, bells, and much more!


<details>
<summary>Items smeltable for an iron nugget</summary>

- Bucket
- Chainmail Boots
- Chainmail Chestplate
- Chainmail Helmet
- Chainmail Leggings
- Heavy Weighted Pressure Plate
- Iron Axe
- Iron Bars
- Iron Chain
- Iron Hoe
- Iron Pickaxe
- Iron Shovel
- Iron Spear
- Iron Sword
- Lantern
- Rails
- Shears
- Shield
- Soul Lantern
- Tripwire hook
</details>


<details>
<summary>Items smeltable for an iron ingot</summary>
  
- Blast Furnace
- Cauldron
- Iron Boots
- Iron Chestplate
- Iron Door
- Iron Helmet
- Iron Horse Armor
- Iron Leggings
- Iron Nautilus Armor
- Iron Trapdoor
- Hopper
- Minecart
</details>

<details>
<summary>Items smeltable for an iron block</summary>

- Anvil
- Chipped Anvil
- Damaged Anvil
</details>


<details>
<summary>Items smeltable for a gold nugget</summary>

- Golden Axe
- Golden Hoe
- Golden Pickaxe
- Golden Shovel
- Golden Spear
- Golden Sword
- Light Weighted Pressure Plate
- Powered Rail

</details>


<details>
<summary>Items smeltable for a gold ingot</summary>

- Golden Boost
- Golden Chestplate
- Golden Helmet
- Golden Horse Armor
- Golden Leggings
- Golden Nautilus Armor

</details>

<details>
<summary>Items smeltable for a gold block</summary>

- Bell

</details>

<details>
<summary>Items smeltable for a copper nugget</summary>
**Note:** Any items can be smelted, regardless of oxidation or waxed state

- Copper Axe
- Copper Bars
- Copper Chain
- Copper Hoe
- Copper Lantern
- Copper Pickaxe
- Copper Shovel
- Copper Spear
- Copper Sword
- Lightning Rod

</details>


<details>
<summary>Items smeltable for a copper ingot</summary>
**Note:** Any items can be smelted, regardless of oxidation or waxed state

- Copper Boots
- Copper Chestplate
- Copper Door
- Copper Helmet
- Copper Horse Armor
- Copper Leggings
- Copper Nautilus Armor
- Copper Trapdoor

</details>

Check out my [Crafting Tweaks collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/VQZNq4ph) for more crafting changes
